title: Analytics - Fit Test Competed
scenario: Fit Test completion analytics event is logged and event count increments in Firebase after successful test on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
4. Go to Device Settings → [Connected Device Name] → Audio Settings.
5. Locate and select the Fit Test feature.
6. Complete the Fit Test successfully by following the on-screen instructions.
7. Open the Firebase Analytics console for the app.
8. Verify that the analytics event for Fit Test completion is displayed with the following default elements: event count, country, gender, session data, app version, build, and environment.
9. Confirm that the device PID is properly logged in the event data.
10. Wait a few hours for analytics data to propagate.
11. Re-check the Firebase Analytics page and confirm that the event count for the Fit Test completion event has increased.
expected: The Fit Test completion analytics event is logged in Firebase Analytics with all required fields (event count, country, gender, session data, app version, build, environment, and device PID). The event count increases after completing the Fit Test.
